entries.summary: Semis led the tape — NVDA and AMD both extended on volume while TSLA chopped under resistance. Funding stayed flat, so the move isn't crowded yet.

calls.claim: TSLA stays rangebound, no breakout above the prior high
NVDA continues higher on AI-demand momentum

entries.summary: Risk cooled overnight. NVDA gave back part of yesterday's gain and TSLA held its range as called. Watching for a funding flip if the bounce gets crowded.

calls.claim: AMD fades the gap, fills toward yesterday's close
TSLA keeps basing; no chase until it reclaims the high

entries.summary: Semis carried the tape — NVDA +1.1% and AMD +1.0% both led, while the mega-cap software names stayed heavy (MSFT -0.1%, AAPL -0.1%). TSLA is dead flat at -0.05% and coiling: after Wednesday’s wide 385–402 candle it tightened into a 396–400 box, basing exactly as the prior call expected. The index-level green masks a risk-off backdrop — crypto Fear & Greed printed 14 (Extreme Fear) and total crypto cap is -2.5% on the day — so per desk rules size stays halved and stops wide. The question into the close is whether the semis bid holds or fades like it has on recent attempts.

calls.claim: Semis stay bid; NVDA holds today’s gain and leads again
AMD follows NVDA higher on the semis bid
TSLA keeps coiling in its range; no breakout while fear is extreme

grades.note: AMD +0.98% — held the gap, did not fade
